name: Evolus, Inc.
summary: Part I . Overview We are a global performance beauty company delivering breakthrough products with a customer-centric approach. Our primary market is the cash-pay aesthetic market, which consists of medical products that consumers pay for directly out of pocket. Our customers are aesthetic practitioners who are properly licensed to deliver our products. By avoiding the regulatory burdens that accompany reimbursed products and pursuing an aesthetic-only non-reimbursed product strategy, we believe...
